creator: mohacsi@niif.hu
text:
Hi!
 	Probably this bug has ben fixed. I have no evidence on this. I 
upgraded the system to 6.3-stable recently and hit another strange IPv6 
related bug.

See
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=kern/121080

Thanks.

Janos Mohacsi
Network Engineer, Research Associate, Head of Network Planning and Projects
NIIF/HUNGARNET, HUNGARY
Key 70EF9882: DEC2 C685 1ED4 C95A 145F  4300 6F64 7B00 70EF 9882

On Mon, 25 Feb 2008, Bruce Cran wrote:

> Hi,
>
> Some changes were made to sys/net/route.c and sys/netinet6/nd6.c in October 
> to fix some routing related panics that were occurring on 7-CURRENT and 6.x 
> when the gateway disappeared.  It should be fixed in both 7.0-RC and 6.3.
>
> Cheers,
> Bruce
>
